title: Digital Time Travel: 3DBigDataSpace Supports Innovative Heritage Projects Across Europe
content: The 3DBigDataSpace continues to drive innovation in the cultural heritage sector by supporting initiatives that push the boundaries of how we explore, understand, and engage with the past. Through its Outreach Synergy Call, two outstanding projects have been selected to showcase the transformative potential of 3D data, digital storytelling, and interdisciplinary collaboration opening up new […]

title: MetaHeritage in Motion: Driving Innovation and Collaboration in Bologna
content: From 15 to 17 April partners of the MetaHeritage Project gathered in Bologna for their third in-person consortium meeting, marking an important milestone in advancing interregional collaboration, innovation, and stakeholder engagement.

title: Twin it! Part II: High-Level Political Closing Event Marks a Milestone for Europe’s 3D Cultural Heritage Strategy
content: On 12 May 2026 in Brussels, the Twin it! Part II campaign will reach a key political milestone with a high-level ministerial closing event, organised by the Europeana Foundation and the European Commission, under the auspices of the Cypriot Presidency of the Council of the EU. The event is by invitation only and will bring […]

title: The Animated Reconstruction of Kasteel de Emer
content: A compelling example comes from the Netherlands, where the disappeared Kasteel de Emer in Breda has been digitally reconstructed and brought back to life through animation.
snippet: A compelling example comes from the Netherlands, where the disappeared Kasteel de Emer in Breda has been digitally reconstructed and brought back to life through animation.

title: Collaborate with EPFL Digital Humanities Students
content: The École Polytechnique Fédérale de Lausanne (EPFL) is inviting organisations to connect with students from its Master’s programme in Digital Humanities.

title: Idiap Create Challenge 2026 (ICC)
content: The Idiap Research Institute invites innovators, creatives, and researchers to take part in the 15th edition of the Idiap Create Challenge (ICC): a dynamic 9-day AI hackathon taking place from 20–28 August 2026 in Martigny, Switzerland. Turning Ideas into Prototypes The ICC is designed to transform innovative ideas into working prototypes, while fostering entrepreneurship and […]

title: INFINITY Surveys on Cultural Heritage & Reuse
content: The INFINITY project invites you to share your insights through two short surveys and contribute to shaping the future of the digital creative economy in Europe.

title: Two PhD Positions in AI for Digital Heritage
content: The AI4DH project has launched an open call for two PhD positions, offering candidates the chance to contribute to cutting-edge research in the field of digital heritage.

title: Twin it! Campaign Grand Finale
content: This May marks an important milestone for Europe’s digital cultural heritage community: the grand finale of the “Twin it! 3D for Europe’s Culture” campaign.

title: ICARUS Convention #36
content: Participants are encouraged to submit contributions that reflect both practical experiences and research-driven approaches, highlighting how archival materials can be leveraged in the digital age.

title: A Week of European Collaboration Across Poznań, Riga, and Stubičke Toplice
content: The Time Machine Organisation played an active role in three major European events, engaging with partners, stakeholders and the wider cultural heritage community. From Poznań to Riga and Stubičke Toplice, last week emphasised the importance of collaboration, digital innovation and knowledge exchange in shaping the future of cultural heritage. title: Digital Ecosystems for Heritage 4.0
content: Researchers and practitioners working at the intersection of digital technologies and cultural heritage are invited to submit contributions to the symposium Digital Ecosystems for Heritage 4.0 Artificial Intelligence, Values and Risk Assessment for Conservation, taking place from 26-28 August in Florence, Italy.
